defs: hospital-acquired infection; nosocomial infection (abbr. for 醫院感染|医院感染[yi1 yuan4 gan3 ran3])
script for opera (esp. in Yuan times)
theater chain (abbr. for 電影院線|电影院线)
the last of the three entry-level exams in the imperial examination system of Ming and Qing dynasties
the head of an institution whose name ends in 院[yuan4]; chair of a board; university president; college dean; premier of the Republic of China
